query: Python argparse option not passed to function local script auth token preflight bug

results.title: google oauth - Imported python module overrides option parser - Stack Overflow
results.description: I had an identical problem. The problem happens because the google authorization module also uses argparse. What you should achieve is not to share that memory space.
